[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 111111111 a
2 111111111 a
3 101111111 8
4 001111101 6
5 111110110 7
6 111111011 8
7 110110111 7

12 111110100 6
23 100110011 5
34 110110111 7 match 7

56 010011000 3
67 010001011 4
70 010000000 1
